room.caption: [G2-ForestP8] Some elements of the old level should be maintained.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10) secondaryLocCheck(2,8)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backZeldaForestTrees backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=0.9 backFollow.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(209) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 if global.mySegmentCheck[1]=0 { newMapX=48 newMapY=128 toRoom=rLink2_PalaceF_4a } else if global.mySegmentCheck[1]=1 { newMapX=48 newMapY=640 toRoom=rLink2_PalaceF_4b }
